APPREGISTRATIONS: Checks that app registrations are controlled and reviewed.
AUTHENTICATIONMETHODBASELINE: Checks that approved sign-in methods are in place.
MTAPPREGISTRATIONOWNERSWITHOUTMFA: Checks that multi-factor authentication is required where needed.
MTCISAACTIVATIONNOTIFICATIONGLOBALADMIN: Checks that privileged-role activation alerts reach global administrators.
MTCISAACTIVATIONNOTIFICATIONOTHER: Checks that activation alerts reach the right users for other privileged roles.
MTCISAAPPADMINCONSENT: Checks that administrator consent for apps follows the approved process.
MTCISAAPPGROUPOWNERCONSENT: Checks that group owners cannot grant app access beyond approved limits.
MTCISAAPPREGISTRATION: Checks that app registrations are controlled and reviewed.
MTCISAAPPUSERCONSENT: Checks that app access and consent are controlled appropriately.
MTCISAAUTHENTICATORCONTEXT: Checks that extra verification is requested in the right situations.
MTCISABLOCKHIGHRISKSIGNINS: Checks that risky sign-ins are blocked or challenged.
MTCISABLOCKHIGHRISKUSERS: Checks that risky users are blocked or remediated.
MTCISABLOCKLEGACYAUTH: Checks that older sign-in methods are blocked.
MTCISACLOUDGLOBALADMIN: Checks that cloud admin access is kept to a minimum.
MTCISACROSSTENANTINBOUNDDEFAULT: Checks that default inbound cross-tenant access is restricted.
MTCISADMINCONSENTWORKFLOWENABLED: Checks that app consent goes through the approved review process.
MTCISAGLOBALADMINCOUNT: Checks that the number of global administrators stays low.
MTCISAGLOBALADMINRATIO: Checks that global administrators stay within a safe share of the tenant.
MTCISAMETHODSMIGRATION: Checks that sign-in methods are being moved to the approved approach.
MTCISAMFA: Checks that multi-factor authentication is required where needed.
MTCISANOTIFYHIGHRISKUSERS: Checks that high-risk users are notified quickly.
MTCISAPASSWORDEXPIRATION: Checks that password expiration follows the approved policy.
MTCISAPERMANENTROLEASSIGNMENT: Checks that privileged access is not left assigned permanently.
MTCISAPHISHRESISTANT: Checks that phishing-resistant sign-in is used where required.
MTCISAPRIVILEGEDPHISHRESISTANT: Checks that privileged users use phishing-resistant sign-in methods.
MTCISAREQUIREACTIVATIONAPPROVAL: Checks that privileged access needs approval before it is activated.
MTCISAUNMANAGEDROLEASSIGNMENTS: Checks that privileged role assignments are not left unmanaged.
MTCISAWEAKFACTOR: Checks that weak sign-in factors are limited or blocked.
MTCISCREATETENANTDISALLOWED: Checks that the related action is limited or blocked as expected.
MTCISFORMSPHISHINGPROTECTIONENABLED: Checks that Microsoft Forms is protected against phishing-style abuse.
MTCISGLOBALADMINCOUNT: Checks that the number of global administrators stays low.
MTCISTHIRDPARTYAPPLICATIONSDISALLOWED: Checks that unapproved third-party apps are blocked.
MTCISWEAKAUTHENTICATIONMETHODSDISABLED: Checks that weak sign-in methods are turned off.
MTSECURITYGROUPCREATIONRESTRICTED: Checks that only approved people can create security groups.
MTTENANTCREATIONRESTRICTED: Checks that tenant creation is limited to approved users.
INSPECTAZPSASSIGNMENT: Checks that Azure PowerShell access is limited to assigned users or roles.
INSPECTAZPSMODULES: Checks that the Azure and Microsoft Graph PowerShell service principals are configured as expected.
INSPECTEMAILVERIFIEDUSERCREATION: Checks that self-service email-verified account creation is controlled.
INSPECTLINKEDINCONNECTION: Checks that users cannot link work accounts to LinkedIn more broadly than policy allows.
INSPECTMSOLPOWERSHELL: Checks that the legacy MSOnline PowerShell module is no longer available.
INSPECTPARTNERSUPPORT: Checks that hidden partner support role assignments are approved.
